cases.prompt: Explore designs and show me some options for this screen

assertions.text: Generates multiple AI design variants for the screen.
Opens a comparison board, collects structured feedback, and iterates.

cases.prompt: 이거 지금 모양이 마음에 안 들어 — 디자인 변형들 보여줘

assertions.text: Produces several distinct design variants to compare rather than a single design.
Collects structured feedback to drive the next iteration.

cases.prompt: 이미 고른 시안을 production HTML로 마무리해줘

assertions.text: Recognizes finalizing a chosen design into production HTML belongs to /design-html, not variant exploration.
